name: STANDARD MOTOR PRODUCTS, INC.
business: Standard Motor Products, Inc. is a leading manufacturer and distributor of premium replacement parts in the automotive aftermarket and a custom-engineered solutions provider to vehicle and equipment manufacturers in diverse non-aftermarket end markets. The company sells products primarily to retailers, warehouse distributors, original equipment manufacturers and original equipment service part operations in the United States, Europe, Canada, Mexico, and other foreign countries.
namedCustomers: Auto Value and Bumper to Bumper (Aftermarket Auto Parts Alliance)
Genuine Parts Company and NAPA (National Automotive Parts Association)
The Automotive Parts Services Group or The Group

exposures.sentence: Product categories include electrical switches and actuators, chassis and drivetrain sensors such as anti-lock brake and vehicle speed sensors, fluid level sensors, pressure sensors such as tire pressure monitoring, temperature sensors, and sensors for advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS).
We also bring to market alternative energy products, which utilize cleaner burning fuels or are designed for electric or hybrid electric vehicles.

Within our Vehicle Control Segment, we focus on expanding our product coverage in advanced powertrain technologies, including start and stop technology, cylinder deactivation, variable valve timing, turbochargers, electronic throttle bodies, diesel exhaust emissions control, gasoline direct injection, active grill shutters; electrification, such as battery cooling fans, drive battery charging cables and adapters, and electric coolant pumps; and safety related categories, such as anti-lock brake, vehicle speed sensors, tire pressure monitoring, park assist sensors and advanced driver assistance components, including blind spot detection sensors, cruise control distance sensors, lane departure sensor cameras and park assist backup cameras.
Furthermore, if we do not invest in or effectively use AI capabilities, or if competitors leverage these technologies more successfully, our competitive position could suffer.

Despite security measures designed to prevent, detect and mitigate the risk of cybersecurity incidents, our information systems, and the systems of our customers, suppliers and business partners, have been subject to and remain vulnerable to harm from such incidents, including interruptions, outages, data breaches, phishing attacks, ransomware attacks, unauthorized access, attempts to hack into our network, and computer viruses.

catalysts.event: Opened new distribution center in Shawnee, Kansas
catalysts.sentence: In the second quarter of 2025, we opened a new distribution center in Shawnee, Kansas.

catalysts.event: Expected revenue synergies from Nissens Automotive acquisition
catalysts.sentence: We expect to benefit from revenue synergies resulting from the acquisition in 2026 and beyond.
